products.name: TRNAV
products.descriptor: Terrestrial navigation system for mission-critical defense platforms

evidence.snippet: **TUALCOM** participated in **MSPO 2025**, a top European **defense industry** show, which took place in Kielce, Poland between September 2-5, 2025. TUALCOM presented its cutting-edge anti-jamming, telemetry, flight termination, electronic warfare, datalink, and **TRNAV** (Terrestrial Navigation) systems, carefully developed to satisfy the highest operational needs.

unresolved_questions: All 10 prioritized products were located and recorded, but all product detail pages were skipped (skipped_class_budget), so SKU-level specs, NDAA, and Blue UAS status remain unknown for every product.
TUALAJ 4200 appears as 'TUALAJ 4200 Mini' in the home page hero and as 'TUALAJ 4200' in the site nav footer; canonicalized to 'TUALAJ 4200' per the nav listing and prioritized product list.
TRNAV (Terrestrial Navigation) is only evidenced in a single news article (MSPO 2025); no dedicated product page was found in the crawl_index — granularity may be sku or family pending a detail page.

The Flight Termination, Data Link, Telemetry, and Electronic Warfare categories each have multiple sub-product pages in the crawl_index (e.g., flight-termination-receiver, l-band-tdma-data-link, telemetry-transmitters, esm-elint-receiver) that were skipped — additional named SKUs almost certainly exist under each.

Product detail page for TUALAJ 8300; would provide specs and compliance signals.
Product detail page for TUALAJ CRPA antenna; would clarify whether it is a standalone antenna SKU and provide specs.
Category overview for Data Link; would enumerate sub-product SKUs (L-band TDMA, S-band FDM/TDMA, C-band FDM data links).
Category overview for Telemetry; would enumerate sub-product SKUs (telemetry receiver, transmitters, stackable suite).
Category overview for Flight Termination; would enumerate sub-products (receiver, transmitter, system SKUs).
Category overview for Electronic Warfare; would enumerate sub-products (ESM/ELINT receiver and others).
